name: Naver Maps
description: The most accurate and up-to-date map of Korea. Used by locals daily.
features: Real-time transit info|Great transit and walking directions|Simple bus & subway routes|Restaurant & shop reviews|Indoor maps
tips:
Switch to English in settings. More accurate than Google Maps in Korea.
English search may not work, so copy and paste the Korean name.

name: Kakao Maps
description: Kakao's map app — great for finding hidden alleys and local spots.
features: Detailed local maps|Road view (street view)|Traffic info|Parking spots|Kakao integration
tips: Use Road View to preview unfamiliar destinations before you go.

name: Kakao T
description: Korea's #1 ride-hailing and taxi app. Available nationwide.
features: Taxi booking|Designated driver|Bike rental|Real-time tracking|Fare estimate
tips: Add a card beforehand to skip cash hassle. Cheaper than regular taxis.

name: T-money
description: Manage your T-money transit card and check balances easily.
features: Card balance check|Transaction history|Nearby top-up locations|Lost card report|Auto top-up
tips: Top up at any convenience store (GS25, CU, 7-Eleven) or subway station.

name: Subway Korea
description: Comprehensive subway guide for all major Korean cities.
features: Offline subway maps|Route planning|Transfer guidance|Last train times|Real-time delay info
tips: Download offline maps before traveling underground where signal is weak.

name: Korail Talk
description: Official KTX & intercity train booking app from Korea Rail.
features: KTX ticket booking|Seat selection|Schedule search|E-ticket|Cancellation & refund
tips: Book popular routes (Seoul–Busan) at least a day ahead, especially weekends.

name: Papago
description: Naver's AI translator. Best accuracy for Korean ↔ English.
features: Text translation|Voice translation|Camera translation|Conversation mode|Handwriting input
tips: Use camera mode to translate menus instantly — it's a lifesaver.

name: Google Translate
description: Reliable backup translator with offline Korean language pack.
tips: Download the Korean language pack for offline use before your trip.

name: Baemin
description: Korea's beloved food delivery app with great UX and wide selection.
tips: Has an English mode. Great for ordering Korean fried chicken late night.

name: Coupang Eats
description: Korea's fastest food delivery — often under 30 minutes.
features: Fast delivery|Wide restaurant selection|Real-time tracking|Reviews & ratings|Group orders
tips: Even convenience store items delivered within 30 minutes. Credit card required.

name: Mangoplate
description: Korea's Yelp — curated restaurant reviews by food enthusiasts.
features: Curated restaurant reviews|Neighborhood guides|Bookmark lists|Food photos|Foreign-friendly filter
tips: Filter by 'Foreigner Friendly' to find English-menu restaurants easily.

name: Siksin
description: Real-time restaurant recommendations trusted by Korean foodies.
tips: Shows what's trending today — perfect for finding local hotspots.

name: Visit Korea
description: Official tourism app by the Korea Tourism Organization.
features: Tourist spot guides|Events calendar|Tour packages|Audio guides|Offline content
tips: Check the events calendar — many free cultural events happen year-round.

name: KakaoTalk
description: Korea's national messaging app — used by virtually everyone.
features: Free messaging|Voice & video calls|Group chats|KakaoPay|Plus Friends (official accounts)
tips: Use 'Plus Friends' to follow Korea Tourism for updates and discount coupons.

name: Naver
description: Korea's most-used search engine — better than Google for local info.
tips: Search Korean restaurant names in Korean for far more review results.

name: Currency Converter Plus
description: Fast and reliable currency converter with real-time rates.
features: Live exchange rates|170+ currencies|Offline mode|Historical charts|Widget support
tips: Set KRW as your base currency and check before paying at markets.
